records.question: Which teams named Columbus Crew have a player called Chung Hong (717) who played exactly 1 year in 2011 with singles, doubles, and total win-loss all 0–0, played as a Midfielder in the match season, and had a draft pick number of at least 18?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT team.team_id FROM team
JOIN match_season ON team.team_id = match_season.team
JOIN player ON team.team_id = player.team
WHERE player.doubles_wl = '0–0' AND player.player = 'Chung Hong (717)' AND player.singles_wl = '0–0' AND match_season.position = 'Midfielder' AND player.years_played = '1 (2011)' AND match_season.draft_pick_number >= 18 AND player.total_wl = '0–0' AND team.name = 'Columbus Crew'
records.pred_sql: select team.team_id from team join player on player.team = team.team_id join match_season on match_season.team = team.team_id and match_season.player = player.player_id where lower(team.name) like '%columbus crew%' and lower(player.player) like '%chung hong (717)%' and player.years_played = 1 and player.total_wl = '0-0' and player.singles_wl = '0-0' and player.doubles_wl = '0-0' and match_season.season = '2011' and lower(match_season.position) like '%midfielder%' and match_season.draft_pick_number >= 18 limit 5
records.thought: Filter teams named 'Columbus Crew' that have a player named 'Chung Hong (717)' with exactly 1 year played, zero win-loss records, played as Midfielder in 2011, and draft pick number at least 18.

records.question: Which teams named Evalyn Feil have players and participated in a match season where the college is UNLV?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT team.team_id FROM team
JOIN match_season ON team.team_id = match_season.team
JOIN player ON team.team_id = player.team
WHERE team.name = 'Evalyn Feil' AND match_season.college = 'UNLV'
records.pred_sql: select team.team_id from team join player on player.team = team.team_id join match_season on match_season.team = team.team_id where lower(player.player) like '%evalyn feil%' and lower(match_season.college) like '%unlv%' limit 5
records.thought: We need to find teams with players named 'Evalyn Feil' who also participated in a match season where the college is 'UNLV'. We join team, player, and match_season tables filtering by player name and college.

records.question: Which teams had forwards from Concordia College drafted at pick number 13 or fewer in the 2001 MLS SuperDraft?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT team.team_id FROM team
JOIN match_season ON team.team_id = match_season.team
WHERE match_season.draft_class = '2001 MLS SuperDraft' AND match_season.position = 'Forward' AND match_season.draft_pick_number <= 13 AND match_season.college = 'Concordia College'
records.pred_sql: select team.team_id from team join match_season on team.team_id = match_season.Team where match_season.Draft_Pick_Number <= 13 and match_season.Draft_Class = '2001' and lower(match_season.College) like '%concordia%' and lower(match_season.Position) like '%forward%' limit 5;
records.thought: I will join the team and match_season tables to find teams with players drafted at pick number 13 or fewer in 2001 from Concordia College who played as forwards.

records.question: What teams have played in countries where the capital is Washington?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT team.team_id FROM team
JOIN match_season ON team.team_id = match_season.team
JOIN country ON match_season.country = country.country_id
WHERE country.capital = 'Washington'
records.pred_sql: select team.team_id from team join match_season on team.team_id = match_season.Team join country on match_season.Country = country.Country_id where lower(country.Capital) like '%washington%' limit 5;
records.thought: To find teams that have played in countries with the capital Washington, join team with match_season and country on their respective keys and filter by country.Capital = 'washington'.

records.question: What teams named Miami Fusion played for Duke in the Isle of Man where the official native language is English Manx?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT team.team_id FROM team
JOIN match_season ON team.team_id = match_season.team
JOIN country ON match_season.country = country.country_id
WHERE country.official_native_language = 'English Manx' AND match_season.college = 'Duke' AND team.name = 'Miami Fusion' AND country.country_name = 'Isle of Man'
records.pred_sql: select team.team_id from team join match_season on team.team_id = match_season.team join country on match_season.country = country.country_id where lower(team.name) like '%miami fusion%' and lower(match_season.college) like '%duke%' and lower(country.country_name) like '%isle of man%' and lower(country.official_native_language) like '%english manx%' limit 5
records.thought: We need to find teams named 'Miami Fusion' that played for Duke in the Isle of Man where the official native language is English Manx. This involves joining team, match_season, and country tables with conditions on team name, match_season college, country name, and official native language.

records.question: Which teams have players who played exactly 1 (2011) and where the team name is Columbus Crew?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT team.team_id FROM team
JOIN player ON team.team_id = player.team
WHERE team.name = 'Columbus Crew' AND player.years_played = '1 (2011)'

records.question: Which teams named Berneice Hand include the player Bae Nam-Ju who played exactly 2 years (1988, 1990) with singles wins-losses of 0–2, doubles wins-losses of 1–1, and total wins-losses of 1–3?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT team.team_id FROM team
JOIN player ON team.team_id = player.team
WHERE player.years_played = '2 (1988, 1990)' AND player.singles_wl = '0–2' AND team.name = 'Berneice Hand' AND player.player = 'Bae Nam-Ju' AND player.total_wl = '1–3' AND player.doubles_wl = '1–1'
records.pred_sql: select team.team_id from team join player on player.team = team.team_id where lower(team.name) like '%berneice hand%' and lower(player.player) like '%bae nam-ju%' and player.years_played = '1988, 1990' and player.singles_wl = '0-2' and player.doubles_wl = '1-1' and player.total_wl = '1-3' limit 5
records.thought: Filter players named 'Bae Nam-Ju' with the specified years played and win-loss records, then join with teams named 'Berneice Hand' to find matching team IDs.

records.question: What teams named Columbus Crew have a Midfielder drafted exactly 18th in the 1996 MLS College Draft from Florida International, where the player's country has English as the official native language and its capital is Washington?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT team.team_id FROM team
JOIN match_season ON team.team_id = match_season.team
JOIN country ON match_season.country = country.country_id
WHERE match_season.draft_pick_number = 18 AND match_season.position = 'Midfielder' AND team.name = 'Columbus Crew' AND country.official_native_language = 'English' AND match_season.college = 'Florida International' AND country.capital = 'Washington' AND match_season.draft_class = '1996 MLS College Draft'
records.pred_sql: select team.team_id from team join match_season on team.team_id = match_season.Team join country on match_season.Country = country.Country_id where lower(team.name) like '%columbus crew%' and lower(match_season.position) like '%midfielder%' and match_season.draft_pick_number = '18' and match_season.draft_class = '1996' and lower(match_season.college) like '%florida international%' and lower(country.official_native_language) like '%english%' and lower(country.capital) like '%washington%' limit 5;
records.thought: Filter teams named 'Columbus Crew' with a midfielder drafted 18th in the 1996 MLS College Draft from Florida International, where the player's country has English as the official native language and its capital is Washington.
